message:
fix(security): NaN/Inf fail-closed guard in action_for_risk quarantine function

action_for_risk() uses >= comparisons against policy thresholds. IEEE 754
NaN makes all >= comparisons false, so a NaN posterior would fall through
to QuarantineAction::None — silently bypassing all quarantine levels.
Now returns QuarantineAction::Quarantine for any non-finite posterior.

3 regression tests added: NaN, Inf, -Inf all map to Quarantine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
